seo.title: Oil Change Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your oil change shop. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

h1: Review Management for Oil Change Services

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Oil Change Services
hero.subheading: Quick stops mean quick exits. ReviewFlo texts after the sticker goes on the windshield.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Oil Change Shop Faces

items.heading: Upsell confusion turns into one-stars
items.body: Filter and fluid lines on the invoice spark anger.

items.heading: Bays are loud and lines are long
items.body: Nobody wants a speech about Google in the waiting room.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Oil Change Shops

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Oil Change Shops Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Fleet and retail
items.body: Same link for managers and individuals.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when service was fast, honest, and easy to book.

items.q: What if wait time was long?
items.a: Private feedback lets you explain staffing before a public rant.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Start per shop when you need separate dashboards.
Keep reviews about overall trust, not a single SKU.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Oil Change Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
